{{Quote|Why did you risk your own safety to help me? You don't even know me.|Eg'Ros Akala|<ref name="First Impressions">{{Tales|15|First Impressions (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Eg'ros Akala''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]]. Around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], he was arrested at the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] for trying to buy a meal at one of the palace's restaurants. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] managed to have him released from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] detention center on Coruscant.
